title: Exercises: Key Management in Quantum Networks

exercises.title: Key Lifecycle Tracker
exercises.description: Implement a complete key lifecycle tracking system.
tasks: Define key states (generated, stored, in_use, expired, retired)
exercises.expectedOutput: Key lifecycle management with audit trail
hints: Check expiration before any key use

exercises.title: Secure Key Store Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate a secure key storage system with access control.
exercises.expectedOutput: Secure key store with access control
hints: Encrypt keys at rest with master key
Log successful and failed access attempts

exercises.title: Key Pool Balancer
exercises.description: Balance key allocation across multiple purposes.
hints: Emergency pool should never be empty

exercises.title: Network Key Distribution Planner
exercises.description: Plan key distribution across a quantum network topology.
tasks: Calculate relay paths for non-adjacent nodes
hints: Key rate limited by weakest link
